---
title: "Digital Marketing"
listing:
  contents:
    - posts/current-trends-answer-engine-optimization/index.qmd
    - posts/current-trends-marketing-research-digital-twins/index.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

This page highlights my current trends posts in digital marketing.
